svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="repair-before-migrate 自愈" id="flywayRepair"> <mxGraphModel dx="-454" dy="-124" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="repair 从「应急命令」变成「开机自愈」：每次 migrate 前自动 repair 去重" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="580" x="170" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="服务启动
FlywayMigrationStrategy
Bean 接管 migrate()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="repairBeforeMigrate?
是 → 先 repair()
去重 schema_history 重复 DELETE 行
(最多 32 轮收敛)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="250" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="migrate()
失败按报错分流
最多重试 6 次" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="480" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="启动成功
schema 一致" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="670" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ES1" edge="1" parent="1" source="S0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="S1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ES2" edge="1" parent="1" source="S1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="S2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ES3" edge="1" parent="1" source="S2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="S3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LBL_OK" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="报错分流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="120" x="80" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GAP" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="号段 gap
Detected resolved migration not applied" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="40" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="COR" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="schema history 损坏
Corrupted schema history / multiple delete entries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="300" x="340" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GAP_OUT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="prod: continue-on-gap 降级
告警 + 跳过 migrate 继续启动
dev: out-of-order 乱序补跑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="40" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="COR_OUT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="repair 去重失败行 → 重放
脚本须幂等(INFORMATION_SCHEMA 守卫)
去重循环最多 32 轮" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="340" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EG1" edge="1" parent="1" source="GAP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;dashed=1;" target="GAP_OUT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EG2" edge="1" parent="1" source="COR" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;dashed=1;" target="COR_OUT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="魔数背后是真实事故的形状：6 次重试、32 轮去重 —— 单次 repair 分批写 DELETE 行，一批删不干净" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="720" x="100" y="384" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 421px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: repair 从「应急命令」变成「开机自愈」：每次 migrate 前自动 repair 去重

div.div:

FlywayMigrationStrategy
Bean 接管 migrate()

div.div:
repairBeforeMigrate?
是 → 先 repair()
去重 schema_history 重复 DELETE 行
(最多 32 轮收敛)
